alerts.message: Travel Update: As of 7:06 PM PT, Train 8 departed Seattle (SEA) operating approximately 2 hours and 5 minutes late. We sincerely apologize for this extended delay during your commute today.
Travel Update: As of 5:21 PM PT, Train 11 departed Portland (PDX) operating approximately 2 hours and 45 minutes late. We sincerely apologize for the delays during your commute today.

Delay Notification: As of 7:41 AM CT, Train 22/422 is currently operating approximately 5 hours and 20 minutes late due to an earlier disabled freight train blocking the tracks. We sincerely apologize for this delay and greatly appreciate your patience.

Travel Resumption: As of 6:13 AM CT, Train 50 resumed service and is currently operating approximately 5 hours and 25 minutes late. We sincerely apologize for this delay and greatly appreciate your patience. Additional delay is expected due to freight interference ahead.
Delay Notification: As of 8:35 AM ET, Train 66 is currently operating approximately 30 minutes late due to rail congestion. We sincerely apologize for the delay and appreciate your patience.
Delay Notification: As of 10:41 AM ET, Train 84 is currently operating approximately 30 minutes late due to speed restrictions. We sincerely apologize for the delay.

Track Obstruction: As of 10:46 AM ET, All services operating between New Haven (NHV) and Providence (PVD) are currently experiencing a delay due to a bridge malfunction on the Conn River Bridge. Bridge inspectors are currently troubleshooting the issue at hand. Once the issue is resolved, all service will resume. A delay of up to 30 minutes is expected. Updates will be provided when more information becomes available. We appreciate your patience and understanding at this time.
Travel Resumption: As of 9:06 AM ET, Train 98 has resumed service and is currently operating approximately 15 minutes late.
